steps.title: Connect popularity to influence
steps.content: The blank refers back to Deane being very popular in France and explains why he could persuade France to assist the United States. The word must describe the high regard other people had for him.

steps.title: Eliminate mismatched traits
steps.content: Choice A means dispute or division, which would not help persuasion. Choice B means honesty, an inner trait rather than public regard. Choice D means consideration for others, also not the standing created by popularity. The answer is C.
